prompt: I want a Stream Deck plugin that connects to the GitHub API. When I press a button it should show how many open PRs I have assigned to me, and pressing it opens the GitHub PR page in my browser. I need to authenticate with GitHub using OAuth. I'm on a Stream Deck MK.2. Build it.
assertions: manifest.json present with valid reverse-DNS UUID and action
Auth uses either PKCE flow OR personal access token stored securely in global settings
Token stored in streamDeck.settings.setGlobalSettings (NOT action settings)
GitHub API called with Authorization header
Button title updated with PR count using setTitle()
streamDeck.system.openUrl() used to open browser to GitHub
plugin.ts registers action and calls streamDeck.connect()
